overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a rain-soaked, foggy dystopian city at night. The player navigates from ground-level industrial streets up to an elevated highway, revealing a sprawling neon-lit cityscape below. Heavy atmospheric effects including rain streaks on the windshield and dense fog limit visibility throughout the clip.

events.description: passing a slow-moving vehicle on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed through foggy industrial streets, navigating between warehouse buildings

notable_agents.action: vehicle traveling ahead in the same direction with headlights visible through fog

entered.detail: cyberpunk-style car dashboard with glowing blue speedometer and HUD elements
large blocky industrial structures with minimal lighting
construction barriers with alternating red and white stripes
tall industrial lighting poles with orange glow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed drive through a rain-soaked industrial district. The vehicle's futuristic dashboard is visible at the bottom of the frame, with rain streaking across the windshield. Large industrial warehouse buildings flank both sides of the multi-lane road, while occasional street lights pierce through the heavy fog. The player overtakes another vehicle while maintaining high speed through the desolate industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway ramp with industrial infrastructure

events.description: vehicle slows significantly from 60 km/h to 20 km/h while approaching the ramp
ascending the elevated highway ramp, revealing the city skyline below through the fog

agents.ego_description: slowing down and driving up an elevated highway ramp, gaining altitude above the ground level

entered.detail: concrete ramp structure leading upward with metal guardrails
tall metal lattice tower with power cables extending across the scene
thick electrical cables stretching between industrial structures

segments.scene_description: The vehicle decelerates sharply as it approaches and begins ascending an elevated highway ramp. The camera angle tilts upward slightly as the car climbs, revealing massive transmission towers and power lines silhouetted against the foggy night sky. The industrial warehouses of the ground level fall away behind the vehicle as it gains elevation, transitioning from the enclosed street to the open ramp structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway overlooking neon-lit city streets

events.description: neon signs become visible below as the vehicle reaches the elevated highway peak, adding pink and blue light to the scene
view opens up to reveal the sprawling cityscape below with scattered neon advertisements and street-level activity

agents.ego_description: crawling slowly along the elevated highway edge, looking down at the city streets below through the rain

entered.detail: dense urban cityscape visible through the fog below the elevated highway
glowing cyan neon sign reading 'softsys' on a building facade
red illuminated hotel sign visible at street level
street-level market structures with various colored awnings

segments.scene_description: Now fully elevated above the ground, the vehicle moves slowly along the highway providing a panoramic view of the cyberpunk city below. The fog partially obscures the distant skyline, but neon signs including a prominent 'softsys' advertisement and a red hotel sign glow through the haze. The camera looks down on street-level market stalls and scattered vehicles, while the rain continues to streak across the windshield. The lighting shifts from pure industrial to a mix of neon colors reflecting off the wet surfaces.

events.description: passing under a large overpass structure that temporarily obscures the sky view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated highway, passing under concrete overpasses and alongside industrial structures

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass with support pillars passing overhead
pedestrian or utility bridge crossing over the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the elevated highway as the vehicle passes under massive concrete overpasses and overhead walkways. The view of the city below is replaced by the industrial infrastructure of the highway itself, with support pillars and overhead structures dominating the frame. The vehicle maintains a slow, steady pace through this covered section, with the rain still visible but the environment feeling more enclosed and sheltered from the open sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a claustrophobic industrial district into a panoramic view of a neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape. It begins with a high-speed dash through a rain-soaked industrial zone, where the vehicle weaves past other cars between towering warehouses under a heavy fog. As the car decelerates and ascends an elevated highway ramp, the enclosed street falls away to reveal massive transmission towers silhouetted against the night sky. The scene then opens into a wide vista from the highway, where the lighting shifts from industrial gray to vibrant neon glows from signs like softsys and red hotels reflecting off the wet windshield. Finally, the open skyline is replaced by the heavy concrete infrastructure of the highway as the vehicle glides under massive overpasses and overhead walkways.
